paramRequireDeep.message: When a variable decorated with '@Param' is not assigned a default value, it must also be decorated with '@Require'.
When a variable decorated with '@Param' is not assigned a default value, it must also be decorated with '@Require'.
When a variable decorated with '@Once', it must also be decorated with '@Param'.

monitorDeepRules.message: The '@Monitor' decorator needs to monitor the state variables that exist.
